abstract: The Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE) is an international research initiative established to address the complex societal challenges posed by a rapidly ageing population. By investigating how Europeans navigate the transitions of later life, the project explores critical questions regarding economic stability, social integration, and physical well-being, as well as the intricate intersections between these domains. In this multidisciplinary volume, the authors leverage the latest SHARE data to provide deep insights into the ageing process, offering a rigorous evidence base to inform policies aimed at fostering a more resilient and inclusive society.
